description_long: This object is a DJ controller or digital audio mixer, featuring a rectangular body with a dark red finish and prominent yellow smiley face graphics on its two large jog wheels. The top surface is densely populated with an array of physical controls, including rotary knobs, sliders, and numerous square and rectangular buttons, many of which are color-coded for function. The front and rear panels are equipped with various ports and connectors, likely for audio input/output and power, as well as additional control dials. The surface is decorated with graffiti-style graphics and text, giving it a distinctive urban, street-art aesthetic. The device appears robust, with a metallic and plastic construction, and is designed to be operated from the front, where the main controls are most accessible.
description: A graffiti-styled DJ controller with yellow smiley jog wheels, numerous buttons, knobs, and sliders, and a dark red body with urban graphics.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main control panel, jog wheels with smiley faces, and the full array of buttons and sliders.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the thickness of the device and the left jog wheel's smiley face.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the input/output ports, connectors, and some graffiti graphics.
description_view_3: Right side view focusing on the right jog wheel and the side profile of the control surface.
attribute_control_interface: physical buttons, rotary knobs, sliders, jog wheels
